name: 手机
shooting_angle: 侧面视角，手持置耳，屏幕内向
reference_prompt: A black standard smartphone with rectangular screen, constructed from glass and metal, captured in a clean product shot from a side angle simulating hand-held position to ear with screen facing inward, no visible text or details on screen.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:警员耳边；运动政策:手持稳定
